title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (1) لسنة 1982 بربط الميزانية العامة للدولة للسنتين الماليتين 1982 و 1983
title_en: Decree No. (25) of 1981 approving the Amendment to the Loan Guarantee contained in the Loan Convention concluded on 4 July 1980 between the Bahrain Aluminium Company, the UK Export Credits Guarantee Department and a Group of Banks in order to Increase the Financing of the Expansion of the Aluminium Smelters Programme
